title: <div>  •  Each week includes an optional creative assignment for extra credit.</
content:
• Each week includes an optional creative assignment for extra credit.
• Examples:
• Week 2 (Epic & Classical Literature): Write a hero’s monologue in Homeric verse.
• Week 6 (Gothic & Psychological Horror): Write a one-page unreliable narrator short story.
• Week 9 (Postmodernism): Create a fictional entry from a lost encyclopedia.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages experimentation and deeper engagement.
• Provides non-traditional learners an alternative to analytical work.
• Adds variety without increasing workload.

3️⃣ “Beat the Professor” Challenge Mode

📜 New Weekly Option: Mastery Exam Alternative

Instead of participating in in-class discussions or assignments, students can opt for a “Mastery Exam” challenge.

📌 Rules & Structure:
• Format: A dense, puzzle-like analytical quiz (short response, short answer, NO multiple choice).
